name: World Legacy - "World Key"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－『<ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>』
desc: You can discard 1 "World Legacy" card; you can Tribute Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's Link Monster: You can return that monster to the Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "World Legacy - "World Key"" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard 1 "World Legacy" card; you can Tribute Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's Link Monster: You can return that monster to the Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "World Legacy - "World Key"" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 "World Legacy" card; you can Tribute Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's Link Monster: You can return that monster to the Extra Deck. action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Extra Deck
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
